autoscaling_group_name.description: Name of the Auto Scaling group to which the scheduled action applies; must be an existing Auto Scaling group.

desired_capacity.description: Specifies the desired number of instances for the Auto Scaling group during the scheduled time. Must be a positive integer.

end_time.description: Specifies the date and time when the scheduled action ends. Must be in the format "YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm:ssZ".

max_size.description: Defines the maximum number of instances the Auto Scaling group can scale up to during the scheduled action.

min_size.description: Specifies the minimum number of instances to maintain in the Auto Scaling group during the scheduled time.

recurrence.description: Defines the recurring schedule for the Auto Scaling action, using a cron or rate expression format.

scheduled_action_name.description: Specifies the name of the scheduled action, which must be unique within the auto scaling group.

start_time.description: Specifies the time for the scheduled action to start, in UTC format. Ensure the format is "YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm:ssZ".

time_zone.description: Specifies the time zone for the schedule, in tz database format (e.g., "UTC", "America/Los_Angeles"). Required for accurate scheduling.
